name: type
description: What kind of value the picker captures.

name: value
description: Bound value for `'time'` (`HH:MM[:SS]`), `'date'` (`YYYY-MM-DD`), `'datetime'` (`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM[:SS]`).

name: open
description: Bindable open state of the dropdown.

name: closeOnClickOutside
description: Close the dropdown when the user clicks outside.

name: showSeconds
description: Show the seconds wheel + segment (time-bearing types).

name: hour12
description: Render the AM/PM toggle and display in 12-hour mode. The bound value remains 24-hour ISO.

name: locale
description: Calendar locale (date-bearing types). Defaults to `'en-US'`.

name: weekStart
description: First day of the week (date-bearing types). Defaults to the locale's convention.

name: min
description: Lower bound (date-bearing types, inclusive).

name: max
description: Upper bound (date-bearing types, inclusive).

name: disabled
description: Standard disabled.

name: readonly
description: Read-only — input + panel both inert.

name: color
description: Palette accent.

name: placeholder
description: Placeholder for the trigger input.

name: label
description: Field label.

name: labelStyle
description: Label placement / behaviour, matches `Input` (`'default' | 'placeholder' | 'inline'`).

name: block
description: Stretch the trigger to its container.

name: placement
description: Dropdown placement relative to the trigger.

name: iconPosition
description: Side of the field where the icon sits. Defaults to `'after'`.

name: mask
description: Override the input mask. Defaults are derived from `type`, `showSeconds`, and `hour12`.

name: icon
description: Custom icon glyph snippet. Falls back to a clock (time) or calendar (date / datetime).

name: onchange
description: Fires on every committed value change.

name: onopenchange
description: Fires when the dropdown open state changes.
